center.name: 馬拉開波湖
center.summary: 馬拉開波湖是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括黑颈冠叫鸭、紫冠雉、Two-banded puffbird等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: canescens is found in Colombia to the northeast of quimarinus in Bolívar and Magdalena and in Venezuela on the eastern side of the Serranía del Perijá and the eastern and western sides of Lake Maracaibo.{{cite book | last =Hilty | first =Steven L

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: coloratus, western Venezuela south of Lake Maracaibo The species inhabits a variety of open to semi-open landscapes including the interior and edges of open deciduous forest, treed savanna, dense secondary forest, and arid scrub with scattered trees

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies of two-banded puffbird is found in the llanos of northeastern Colombia and into northern Venezuela almost to Lake Maracaibo on the west, east to near the Guyana border, and south slightly into Amazonas and Bolívar states

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: brunnescens is found in the Serranía del Perijá where northeastern Colombia and northwestern Venezuela meet, east around Lake Maracaibo, and also in the Venezuelan Coastal Ranges intermittenly from Falcón to Delta Amacuro.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The northern screamer is found across northern Colombia from the Atrato River and Magdalena River valleys east into the Lake Maracaibo area of Venezuela
